title: Weekend Trip Planner
scenario: Create a sample weekend trip itinerary for a family, including travel time, accommodations, activities, and meal times. The output should be in a simple list format.
constraints: Must include the destination, travel dates, and accommodation details
Use bullet points to break up the itinerary

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the prompt includes the required details (destination, travel dates, accommodation) and uses bullet points.
Verify if the weekend trip itinerary includes travel time, accommodations, activities, and meal times.
Evaluate if the list format is consistent throughout the itinerary.
